fix_suggestions.label: Sequence layout core
fix_suggestions.reason: Sequence mismatch without teoz usually belongs to lifeline width, self-message width, or message layout.

fix_suggestions.label: Sprite renderer
fix_suggestions.reason: Sprite, transform, or path-data mismatches usually come from the SVG sprite renderer rather than parser logic.

code_anchors.reason: Sequence mismatches usually belong to tile spacing, participant width, or self-message placement.
